name: Jeanne Moreau
description: French actress, singer, screenwriter and director (1928-2017)
abstract: Jeanne Moreau (French: [ʒan mɔʁo]; 23 January 1928 – 31 July 2017) was a French actress, singer, screenwriter, director, and socialite. She made her theatrical debut in 1947, and established herself as one of the leading actresses of the Comédie-Française.

concerts.label: Music from the Films of Merchant Ivory

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Sheldon
about_quotes.evidence: Although Miles made a couple of movies with Jeanne Moreau, “The Diary of a Chambermaid,” I think he played in that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack Sheldon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
